admission_process: Here are the important dates of the admission process conducted by IIT Hyderabad.
exams_accepted: IIT Hyderabad offers admission to the MSc program in 3 specializations such chemistry, physics, and mathematics. For admission to the IITH MSc program, Candidates need to appear for the IIT-JAM entrance exam followed by an interview round for the final selection conducted by the institute.

admission_process: IIT Guwahati offers Ph.D programs in Regular, sponsored, part-time, and self-financed modules in 24 different specializations. The admission criteria for Ph.D programs are discussed below.
exams_accepted: JEE Advanced, JEE Main, GATE, CAT, IIT JAM, CEED, UCEED

admission_process: IIT Delhi offers multiple PG programs, namely MS Research, M.Sc., M.Des, MA, MBA, MPP, and PG Diploma courses. Admissions are based on the National Level Entrance test Score or merit, depending on the chosen course. Candidates can check the details of the PG programs mentioned below:
exams_accepted: JEE Advanced, JEE Main, GATE, CAT, IIT JAM, CEED, UCEED, UGC NET
eligibility_criteria: The IIT Delhi PhD. admissions are based on personal interviews conducted by the concerned department/center. The applications for IIT Delhi PhD. admission 2024-2025 were available in March 2024 at https://owncloud.iitd.ac.in/nextcloud/index.php/s/YQW7tbrr8MwbxG7.
important_dates: The application form for M.Tech Admissions 2024 at IIT Delhi was released on the official website the institution- home.iitd.ac.in on March 20, 2024. The last date for filling out the application form was April 4, 2024. The IIT Delhi M.Tech admissions are based on the candidates’ GATE scores.
